log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician HP: 19/67
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
